meta.siteDescription: Burak Boduroglu's personal site focused on context engineering, prompt engineering, agentic coding, and production-minded fullstack/DevOps work.

home.eyebrow: Context Engineering · Agentic Coding · Prompt Engineering
home.headline: I build LLM-enabled products with strong software fundamentals and agentic workflows.
home.sub: I build projects in context engineering, prompt engineering, web applications, and automation using Next.js, Java/Spring Boot, Python, PostgreSQL, n8n, Docker/Podman, and VPS/Dokploy.
home.pillarFullstackDesc: I design TypeScript apps with APIs and data layers that are production-ready from the beginning.
home.pillarAutomationDesc: I automate repetitive work and make integrations observable with n8n-style orchestration.
home.pillarDevopsDesc: I work with container-based environments, VPS, and Dokploy for safer deploys and stable operations.
home.pillarAiDesc: I make LLM behavior more predictable with context modeling, prompt templates, guardrails, and practical evaluation loops.

about.title: About
about.metaDescription: Burak Boduroglu — context engineering, prompt engineering, agentic coding, fullstack development, and DevOps.
about.lead: To me, quality software means a system where context, prompts, and engineering discipline work together.
about.p1: I build products with Next.js and TypeScript, backend services with Java (Spring Boot) and Python, and data layers with PostgreSQL. For integration workflows I use n8n, and for delivery I use Docker/Podman with VPS/Dokploy.
about.p2: In LLM-heavy projects, I treat context engineering and prompt engineering as first-class layers. With an agentic coding mindset, I break work into explicit steps and add evaluation/guardrail checkpoints for more reliable outputs.
approach: Clarify the problem, constraints, and what “done” means first
Small, repeatable slices of delivery with early feedback
Observability and the simplest practical rollback paths
For LLMs: context engineering, prompt engineering, and guardrail-first evaluation loops
For agentic coding: clear task decomposition, tool selection, and explicit quality gates
